creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 256168
port patch

WARNING! Depends on https://reviews.freebsd.org/D45878

Changes:
- update to 4.2.3 (latest now)
- modernize meson build option declaration
- dedicate backend options to a separate group
- add several of new options (comics and pixbuf backends, introspection). Keep their default values as before for compatibility
- fix t1lib build with localbase:ldflags
- add DOCS option and fix build if it's enabled (upstreaming in progress - https://github.com/linuxmint/xreader/pull/662)
